prompt: Reimagine the heads-up display (HUD) from the reference game screenshot as if it were designed for a young child, using large, colorful, cartoonish icons and simple text.
prompt_refined: Generate an updated version of the heads-up display (HUD) within image 1, redesigning it entirely for a young child. The transformation should apply to all visible HUD elements, including the mini-map and markers in the top-left, the compass and countdown timer in the top-center, the player and score counts in the top-right, the player list with names, health, and money in the bottom-left, the central crosshair, and the weapon, ammo, grenade, and button prompts in the bottom-right. All existing icons must be replaced with large, vibrant, and distinctly cartoonish graphics. All numerical and text information should be rendered in a simple, clear, and child-friendly font, emphasizing readability and a playful visual aesthetic across the entire interface.
objects: Redesigned mini-map with large, vibrant, cartoonish graphics and markers in the top-left
Redesigned compass with large, vibrant, cartoonish graphics in the top-center
Redesigned countdown timer with simple, clear, child-friendly font in the top-center
Redesigned player and score counts with large, vibrant, cartoonish graphics and child-friendly font in the top-right
Redesigned player list with names, health, and money in simple, clear, child-friendly font in the bottom-left
Redesigned central crosshair emphasizing a playful visual aesthetic
Redesigned weapon display with large, vibrant, cartoonish graphics in the bottom-right
Redesigned ammo count in simple, clear, child-friendly font in the bottom-right
Redesigned grenade display with large, vibrant, cartoonish graphics in the bottom-right
Redesigned button prompts emphasizing a playful visual aesthetic in the bottom-right
